inputs.label: Hot Fluid Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of the hot fluid entering the heat exchanger.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the hot fluid.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Inlet temperature of the hot fluid.

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Desired outlet temperature of the hot fluid.

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of the cold fluid.

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Specific Heat
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the cold fluid.

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Inlet temperature of the cold fluid.

inputs.label: Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Overall heat transfer coefficient of the heat exchanger.
